data.title: Global markets rattled as U.S. stock slump spreads to Asia and Europe, breaking a period of calm.
data.description: On Wednesday, there was a decrease in U.S. stocks which led to a downturn in Asian and European markets, interrupting a recent period of stability.

data.title: Japan restarts world's largest nuclear plant amid anxiety, balancing clean energy demand post-2011 Fukushima Daiichi incident.
data.description: Japan is making a comeback in nuclear power in response to the need for increased clean energy sources. This decision is taken while considering the aftermath of the 2011 Fukushima Daiichi disaster.

data.title: JinkoSolar's subsidiary, Jinko Solar Co., Ltd., reveals preliminary unaudited 2025 financial results in China, NY.
data.description: In Shangrao, China on January 21, 2026, JinkoSolar Holding Co., Ltd. (NYSE: JKS), a leading solar module manufacturer globally, disclosed that its main subsidiary, Jinko Solar Co., is now majority-owned by the company. JinkoSolar is recognized for its innovation and scale in the solar industry.

data.title: Workhuman study shows employees recognized for goal contribution are 5x more engaged in company initiatives.
data.description: In a recent study conducted by Workhuman®, a top employee recognition provider, significant findings were revealed. The Workhuman Global Research Study discovered that regular, top-notch recognition tied to strategic objectives leads to clearer comprehension of company values and goals among employees. This approach fosters better alignment, stronger investment, and a sense of psychological safety crucial for effective team performance. The study encompassed multiple countries and highlighted the importance of strategic recognition in enhancing employee engagement and organizational success.

data.title: Bitcoin drops below $88K, filling new year CME gap. Traders remain cautious as BTC hits key price target.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has reached a significant target value set at the beginning of January. Additionally, various CME futures gaps now stand higher than the current price of Bitcoin. Despite these developments, traders have maintained a high level of caution.
